restart.title: Restart Computer
restart.message: Are you sure you want to restart the computer?
restart.detail: This will close all applications and restart the system in 30 seconds.
restart.cancelNote: Type "shutdown /a" in Command Prompt to cancel.

updateAvailable.title: Update Available
updateAvailable.message: A new version is available and will be downloaded in the background.

updateReady.title: Update Ready
updateReady.message: Update downloaded. Application will restart to apply the update.
